creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dan Langille from comment #11)
Given that there has been no response in this PR (or the previous one regarding curl (PR 283020)) there has been no response from the maintainer in 3 weeks in total. Taking previous attempts into consideration by myself and others it's not uncommon to get no response at all irregardless of separate mails or PRs.
